_comment: Project hooks. Runs after every Edit/Write to keep Go files tidy. gofmt is fast (<50ms) so we run it inline; go vet runs at task commit time via the plan, not here.

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; if [ -n "$f" ] && [[ "$f" == *.go ]] && command -v gofmt >/dev/null 2>&1; then gofmt -w "$f" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; }
